creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 236853
new port www/tomcat101 (diff to tomcat-devel)

Tested on 13.1-p2 amd64: make check-plist/install/run.

https://tomcat.apache.org/tomcat-10.1-doc/changelog.html#Tomcat_10.1.0_(markt)

The Apache Tomcat team announces the immediate availability of Apache
Tomcat 10.1.0 (stable).

This is the first stable release of the 10.1.x branch.
